name: Gado-Gado (Mixed Vegetables in Peanut Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes with their skins on.
2. Blanch the vegetables (spinach, cabbage, and bean sprouts) until they are tender-crisp.
3. Chill all cooked vegetables.
4. Arrange the vegetables attractively in a serving dish.
5. Serve with saus ka‡ang.
